commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validate all rule files. Exits 0 if all rules are valid.

commands.name: lint
commands.description: Run HyperFlux discipline enforcement against source and rule files.

commands.name: test
commands.description: Run snapshot tests for rules via Vitest.

options.description: Watch rule files and re-run on change.

commands.name: trace
commands.description: Render a saved evaluation trace JSON file as a readable tree.

options.description: Show full inputs and outputs for each node.
Highlight nodes slower than this threshold (ms).

args.name: file
args.description: Path to a trace JSON file saved by RequestContext.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Scaffold a new rule stub in the given domain.

args.name: name
args.description: Rule name within the domain (e.g. atm.fee).

commands.name: init
commands.description: Scaffold a new HyperFlux project in the current directory.
